description: Reference hashes for ED-SIM v1 sample outputs. Generated by validate_outputs.py --generate-hashes. Used for Tier-1 bitwise reproducibility checks.
note: These hashes are environment-specific. They are valid only for the exact environment recorded in environment_check.json. Cross-environment comparison should use Tier-2 (field-by-field) or Tier-3 (observable) checks.
